name: Cash Store
description_short: Cash Store Houston, Texas — Cash Store is a Houston storefront lender offering unsecured installment loans with same-day funding and online pre-qualific...
description_long:
Cash Store operates a physical lending location at 19734 Tomball Pkwy in Houston, Texas. The website displays a Check 'n Go maintenance notice, indicating Cash Store operates within or alongside the Check 'n Go consumer lending network. This location carries a 4.9-star rating across 208 Google reviews, with recurring praise for named staff members and fast service. The business focuses on short-to-medium term installment lending to Houston-area residents who need cash quickly and may not qualify for traditional bank financing.

The core product is an unsecured installment loan — a loan repaid on a fixed schedule over a set period — marketed for covering major purchases, consolidating bills, or handling unexpected expenses. Borrowers can pre-qualify online, then visit the store with required documents to complete the application. Approved borrowers typically receive funds the same day. Cash Store also offers the Netspend Prepaid Mastercard, a reloadable card usable for bills and shopping without a traditional bank account. Existing customers have an additional option: retail refinancing or re-loaning on their current installment loan by calling the store directly.

Several features set this location apart within the storefront lending space. The pre-qualification step online reduces in-store friction. The store accepts the Matricula Consular card as a valid government-issued ID alongside standard U.S. driver's licenses, making it accessible to undocumented or non-citizen residents. The 4.9-star review score from over 200 customers is notably high for this category, with multiple reviewers citing specific staff by name and same-day funding speed. The Netspend card offering also serves customers without active checking accounts, though an active account is ultimately required to originate a loan.

Honestly, Cash Store is a high-cost, short-access lender by nature. No interest rates or APR ranges are disclosed on the website — a significant transparency gap that makes it impossible for borrowers to comparison shop before visiting. An in-store visit is required to complete every loan application, and operating hours are limited (10AM–6PM weekdays, 10AM–2PM Saturday, closed Sunday). Borrowers should be aware that installment loans from storefront lenders like Cash Store typically carry triple-digit APRs in Texas, where rate caps on this loan type do not apply. This product is best suited for borrowers who have exhausted lower-cost alternatives.
address: 12626 Woodforest Blvd Ste A, Houston, TX 77015

company_info.headquarters: 12626 Woodforest Blvd Ste A, Houston, TX 77015

pros: Same-day funding available after in-store approval
4.9-star Google rating from 208 verified reviews — unusually high for storefront lending
Online pre-qualification step reduces time spent in store
Accepts Matricula Consular card as valid government ID, expanding access to non-citizen residents
Existing customers can refinance or re-loan by phone without a full re-application
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard available for customers without traditional bank accounts
Credit is a factor but not an automatic disqualifier — bad/no credit applicants can still apply
cons: No APR, fee schedules, or loan amount ranges disclosed anywhere on the website
In-store visit is mandatory to complete application — not a fully online lender
Limited hours (closes 6PM weekdays, 2PM Saturday, closed Sunday) reduce accessibility
Requires an active checking account open at least 30 days — excludes the fully unbanked
Storefront installment loans in Texas are typically very high-cost due to absence of state rate caps
best_for: Houston-area residents needing cash the same day with bad or thin credit
Non-citizens or undocumented residents who hold a Matricula Consular card
Existing Cash Store customers looking to refinance or extend their current loan
Borrowers who have already been turned down by banks or credit unions and need a physical location to work with
diagnosis: Cash Store is best for Houston residents who need emergency cash the same day and cannot qualify for a bank loan or credit union product, particularly those with bad credit or non-standard ID. The primary caveat is that rates are never disclosed publicly, and storefront installment loans in Texas routinely carry triple-digit APRs — borrowers should ask for the full APR in writing before signing.
services: In-store loan application with associate assistance
Online document upload prior to store visit
Retail refinancing for existing loan customers
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard issuance and reloading
Underwriting review for bad and no-credit applicants
